templates.name: arco-recommendation-spotlight
templates.description: Single best-match machine recommendation with clear reasons and alternatives for context
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user wants one clear best recommendation. Best for queries like 'best espresso machine under $1000' or 'what should I buy?'

blocks.guidance: Headline names the recommended machine and captures the key reason it fits. Subheadline gives price range or key spec.
2–3 paragraphs explaining why this machine, who it is for, and the key differentiator vs alternatives
Top recommended pick plus 2 alternatives at different price points
The most relevant guide or story for this machine (e.g. dialing in espresso, maintenance tips)

templates.name: arco-recommendation-bundle
templates.description: Machine and grinder pairing recommendation with a brewing recipe to get started
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user asks about a complete setup, mentions needing a grinder, or is starting from scratch with no equipment.

blocks.guidance: Headline focuses on the complete setup: machine + grinder combination name and key benefit
The recommended machine and grinder pairing, each with a short reason why they work together
A beginner-friendly recipe to try immediately with the recommended setup
Tips for getting started: grind settings, water temperature, workflow advice

templates.name: arco-comparison-versus
templates.description: Head-to-head comparison of 2–3 specific machines the user named or implied
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user names or clearly implies 2–3 specific machines to compare (e.g. 'Primo vs Doppio', 'compare the Studio and Doppio').

blocks.guidance: Headline frames the comparison directly (e.g. 'Primo vs Doppio: which is right for you?')
Feature-by-feature matrix of the machines being compared with a recommended winner
Verdict: 2–3 paragraphs explaining who should pick which machine and why
Real owner quotes about the compared machines

templates.name: arco-comparison-guide
templates.description: Decision guide comparing options across price points when the user needs help choosing
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user wants help choosing but hasn't named specific machines — they need guidance across price tiers.

blocks.guidance: Headline positions this as a buyer's guide (e.g. 'Finding your perfect espresso machine')
3 options at different price tiers (entry, mid, premium) each with title, body and CTA
Decision guide Q&A: 4–6 questions that help the user identify which tier is right for them
A beginner or buying guide article for further reading

templates.name: arco-discovery-editorial
templates.description: Brand-first editorial page for users exploring the world of specialty coffee for the first time
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user is brand new to specialty coffee and exploring the world of craft espresso for the first time.

blocks.guidance: Inviting headline that welcomes a new coffee explorer (warm, not product-forward)
Brief brand story and philosophy: what makes specialty coffee different, Arco's approach (2–3 paragraphs)
4 cards representing coffee journey stages (Beginner, Home Barista, Enthusiast, Pro). Each card has a title, 1-sentence description, and a CTA. Use '#' for href rather than inventing URLs.
An editorial story or experience article that sets the mood

templates.name: arco-discovery-guide
templates.description: Product-family exploration for users who know they want espresso but aren't sure where to start
templates.selectionHint: Use when the user knows they want espresso but doesn't know which machine family or price tier to look at.

blocks.guidance: Headline invites exploration (e.g. 'Which Arco machine is your match?')
3 machine families as cards: entry-level, enthusiast, prosumer — each with headline, key benefits, and CTA
Getting started tips: what to expect, grind importance, maintenance basics (2–3 paragraphs)
A simple first-shot recipe to inspire confidence in a beginner
